channel.header: Channel for discussing knowledge management initiatives.

channel.name: online_training
channel.header: Channel for discussing online training programs.
channel.purpose: Share updates on online training modules and discuss completion rates.

post.message: Good morning everyone! The Q3 2025 report for the online training modules is in. Between July 1 and September 30, 2025, we had 120 out of 150 targeted care team members complete the head and neck cancer management online training modules. This is a solid completion rate, but we clearly still have some work to do to ensure all team members are fully trained.

Thanks for sharing, John. It's great to see the high completion rate for the head and neck cancer management training. As we plan our knowledge management strategy for 2026, let's focus on addressing the knowledge gaps for the remaining 30 care team members. This will be key to improving patient care outcomes.
Just a quick reminder about the team meeting tomorrow at 10 AM. We'll be discussing our upcoming knowledge management initiatives for Q3. Please come prepared with your updates.
Thanks for the reminder, Isabella. I've noted some points regarding the resource allocation for our new initiatives. Looking forward to discussing them tomorrow.
Hello team, we've received some feedback on the new online training modules. Users are finding the user interface quite user-friendly. Good work everyone!
That's great to hear, John. Let's keep tracking user feedback and make any necessary adjustments.
Just got an update from the tech team. The implementation of the new knowledge management software is on track and should be completed by the end of this week.
